{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ark’s violet-and-black shield
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]]'s violet-and-black shield was keeping the characters in the fight.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
